message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

box "Virologist wear gloves" #LightBlue
    participant attackerVirologist as V1 <<Virologist>> 
end box 

participant v2 <<v: Virologist>>  
participant gOnViroligst<<glovesOnVirologist : Gloves >>  

activate  V1   
note over V1:gloveAttack()    
decreaseTTL(gOnViroligst)     
destroy   gOnViroligst   

@enduml
